CORRECTION to game-01 report: 'Agenda 2->3 did not spawn Ghoul Priest' is NOT a bug. In Return to The Gathering, the Ghoul Priest spawn moved from the agenda to Act 2 (The Barrier) back: 'Spawn the set-aside Ghoul Priest in the Hallway.' Verified game-02 R9: act advance spawned him in the Hallway correctly. Engine behavior was right; the original report should be closed.
